name: Currant Wheels
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll out the pastry to a rectangle measuring 14X18 inches (45X35 cm).
2. Brush the pastry with the fat.
3. FOR THE FILLING: Mix together the filling ingredients and distribute evenly over the pastry.
4. Starting from the shorter side, roll up like a Swiss roll.
5. Use a sharp knife to cut off slices about 1 1/4 inches (1.5 cm) thick.
6. Lay these on a greased baking sheet and flatten slightly.
7. OVEN: Preheat for 5 minutes at very hot temperature.
8. BAKING TIME: Bake for 15-20 minutes.
9. FOR THE ICING: Sieve the icing sugar and blend with as much of the water as will give a good coating consistency. Ice the currant wheels while still hot.
